name: Koza Anadolu Metal Madencilik Isletmeleri A.S.
summary: Koza Anadolu Metal Madencilik Isletmeleri A.S. operates in the mining sector in Turkey. The company explores for, develops, and produces copper, lead-zinc, iron, and other mineral deposits. It holds interests in the Balikesir Sagirlar Project, Nigde Ciftehan Project, Nigde Elmali Project, Giresun Konak Project, and Batman Sason Project. The company is based in Ankara, Turkey. Koza Anadolu Metal Madencilik Isletmeleri AS is a subsidiary of Ipek Dogal Enerji Kaynaklari Arastirma ve Uretim A.S.
